title: 이런여자와는 절대로 연애하시면 안됩니다. 무조건 피하세요.
text: Hello, this is Naeshi. The topic of today's video is the 10 things you should absolutely never date, no matter how pretty or attractive they are. Lately, when I talk to men, I've noticed that not only women but men are afraid of meeting a strange woman—someone they really shouldn't see—and getting entangled in a bad situation. So, I want to explain how you can meet a woman who isn't strange, but one who helps you grow, brings you happiness, complements your weaknesses, and creates synergy with a truly healthy mindset. First of all, I believe that if you just avoid women who fall into these 10 categories, you can definitely meet such a woman. [Applause] [Music] A woman who has no dreams and whose presence doesn't infringe upon them. Because if a woman has no dreams and no hobbies to pour her passion into, her life becomes incredibly lethargic. If a woman doesn't have a hobby of her own that she truly loves, wants to immerse herself in, and desires, then if a man meets such a woman, she will depend on him 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. "Always come to see me," "Always pay attention to me." She will give advice to men like this, saying things like, "Give it to me." And should I say that a woman without dreams is hopeless? She won't even support your dreams; she is someone who has no interest. No matter how pretty she looks, if men are with her, they will feel a sense of depression, as if they are sinking into a swamp. So, if you meet a woman like this, you can never grow as a man. And the second point is a woman who has no friends. So, not having a girlfriend means you lack your deepest, best brand. It does n't necessarily have to be a friend; you need to have a close friend, like a younger sister of a close older sister, or a same-sex friend. You do n't necessarily have to meet those friends, but you need at least one, two, or three close friends you meet frequently. If that woman is always alone without even a single such friend, then perhaps she has a problem with her social skills. Such a woman might choose to avoid romantic relationships because she wants to isolate herself in her car, or she might have been bullied by her friends because she has such a strange mentality. In any case, you must

title: 이런여자와는 절대로 연애하시면 안됩니다. 무조건 피하세요.
text: with her social skills. Such a woman might choose to avoid romantic relationships because she wants to isolate herself in her car, or she might have been bullied by her friends because she has such a strange mentality. In any case, you must question the social skills of someone who has not a single friend. And this kind of woman, too, to me... She is obsessed with me 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The third type is a woman who is good at lying. She lies not only to herself but to everyone around her, and lies are ingrained in her daily life. Sometimes she tells huge lies and does not live a truthful life. A man must be prepared to risk his life for a woman who lies so well and habitually. She is untrustworthy. How could anyone possibly meet such an untrustworthy woman? She is absolutely not a woman I can meet as a partner or as my spouse for a long time. The fourth type is a woman who frequently talks about her past lovers. It is acceptable to mention a man I dated before, or my husband, once or twice, but if a woman habitually mentions her past lovers frequently, she is a very dangerous person. She is someone whose past has not been cleanly resolved. But usually, when we look at people who talk about past lovers, husbands, or troublemakers, do you think there are any who speak positively about them? There are probably more who speak negatively than positively. Because those negative emotions from the past remain in such people, if she meets me now and dates me while harboring those negative feelings, she will likely constantly compare me to the person from her past... You will get caught up in each other without any negative feelings. This absolutely does not help with a healthy relationship. And honestly speaking, if the woman you are dating keeps talking frequently about people she knew or dated in the past, no one likes listening to that. Also, you need to

title: 이런여자와는 절대로 연애하시면 안됩니다. 무조건 피하세요.
text: e feelings. This absolutely does not help with a healthy relationship. And honestly speaking, if the woman you are dating keeps talking frequently about people she knew or dated in the past, no one likes listening to that. Also, you need to be careful of women who start a new relationship immediately after it hasn't been long since their last one ended. For example, let's say you are introduced to a woman who is dating you only a month or a week after her last relationship ended. People can break up in relationships and connections like that. However, everyone needs time to think about the wounds or experiences received from those breakups. But some people can't endure that and meet someone new right away—I hear people these days do things like "switching partners" or something like that—but anyway, I consider people who don't take time for themselves to reflect on their past relationships to be somewhat dangerous. The fifth dangerous type of woman is someone who cools down the relationship very quickly. For example, a woman who suddenly starts sending "I love you" texts after only a week of dating is a bit strange. I do n't think there is anything good about a relationship moving that fast. It is right to be cautious and get to know each other slowly. Because... It takes that much time for feelings to develop and for emotions to grow. If someone starts sending love messages and talking about our future too aggressively to someone you haven't known for long, you should be a little suspicious. They are a bit strange. If a relationship is pushed to the limit like that—speeding like crazy—it is bound to lead to a major accident. If someone rushes in too quickly and forcefully pushes the relationship in, you should consider that there is a problem. The sixth point is being overly suspicious. Recently, a man had a brief consultation with me about the woman he was dating. I do n't know what her problem is, but she keeps rummaging through his phone. She even rummages through his closet when he comes home. She opens up old letters from the past, digging through them because she feels sad. I don't know why she does that. Also, if she says she is meeting friends, she sends over 100 phone calls and texts. How can a relationship be enjoyable when people are so suspicious these days? Without a foundation of basic trust between the man and woman, it is a relationship that absolutely cannot last long. Even if the woman is pretty and attractive... If a

title: 이런여자와는 절대로 연애하시면 안됩니다. 무조건 피하세요.
text: n a relationship be enjoyable when people are so suspicious these days? Without a foundation of basic trust between the man and woman, it is a relationship that absolutely cannot last long. Even if the woman is pretty and attractive... If a woman doubts me, cannot trust me, constantly rummages through my phone, and searches for who I meet, I consider her to be mentally abnormal. If a man dates a woman like this for a long time, his mental state will likely completely collapse. The seventh type is a woman who is extremely jealous. When a woman is jealous, it leads to frequent arguments between the two of them. She nitpicks and harps on every single woman the man meets, demanding that he only look at her. She insists he look only at her, pays him all attention, and gradually cuts off his social circle to prevent any other woman from even daring to hover around him. No one tolerates that. Therefore, I think you should be cautious of women who are excessively jealous. Of course, being a woman, a little jealousy is cute. However, if she tries to control everyone around her with such excessive jealousy, she is a woman you must definitely filter out. The eighth type is a woman who is overly obsessed with material things. The reason this type of woman is dangerous is that she dates a man for his money. She cares about how nice gifts he buys her, or how much he earns. She is a woman who judges a man's value based on what kind of car he drives, how much money he spends on her, and whether he takes her to nice restaurants. Such women are incredibly attractive, beautiful, and sensual, making it impossible for men not to be captivated. Men know—they know that she met them for money, for the sake of it. However, because she possesses such fatal charm, they are drawn to her despite knowing this. You have seen many men who end up penniless, right? Let's call them "gold diggers." To win over the heart of such a woman who is sure to sway them, they spend a huge amount of money. They buy her expensive luxury goods, provide her with living expenses and allowances, and continue the relationship. But ultimately, when the man runs out of money and can no longer support her, she simply and ruthlessly dumps him and leaves for a man who offers more.

title: 이런여자와는 절대로 연애하시면 안됩니다. 무조건 피하세요.
text: y goods, provide her with living expenses and allowances, and continue the relationship. But ultimately, when the man runs out of money and can no longer support her, she simply and ruthlessly dumps him and leaves for a man who offers more. When I see men who know this but still can't handle it, it is truly obvious right in front of them. It is regrettable. And the ninth type is the woman who is stuck in a corner of the room. Of course, she is a woman with a personality disorder or paranoid delusion. Her specialty is... well, the kind we occasionally encounter in our surroundings. Narcissistic women are those who sacrifice the people around them for what they want. Women with persecutional delusions always think of themselves as the masters in their relationships, so they make the other person out to be the bad guy in any situation. If a mentally unstable person like this comes into your life and gets entangled with you, you will have to live in constant pain. It is truly awful; no matter how much love a man gives her, she cannot be fixed. So, if she strangely focuses her resentment on you in a normal situation, you should suspect something is wrong. It is best to quietly run away. And finally, the tenth key is a tendency to cheat. A while ago, someone came to me for counseling. They said they discovered that the woman they were dating was dangling multiple men besides them. They were so angry that they broke up, but they said they kept thinking about her. They wanted to go back to her, but she swore she would never see another man again, so they asked me if they could trust her. I told them no. That person has a natural tendency. Everyone has their own innate nature or innate talent, but some people have a tendency to cheat, while others have various other traits. That is something that can never be fixed by environmental factors. It is simply one's own genes, beyond one's control. So I told him: "If you really miss her and want to come back to me, go ahead with the mindset that it doesn't matter what man she meets, and that just being by her side is enough. But do n't believe her promise that she will never cheat again." If you meet someone like this and they exhibit flirtatious behavior— looking at other men or women—you absolutely cannot think, " Oh, if this happens, they won't do it again." It is easier for them to do it two or three times. Eventually, they will cheat openly. Therefore, you will ultimately have no choice but to

title: 이런여자와는 절대로 연애하시면 안됩니다. 무조건 피하세요.
text: g at other men or women—you absolutely cannot think, " Oh, if this happens, they won't do it again." It is easier for them to do it two or three times. Eventually, they will cheat openly. Therefore, you will ultimately have no choice but to live that kind of life. So, if you discover this from the beginning, or if such an incident occurs, it is right for you to decisively cut ties with the person who is prone to cheating. It absolutely cannot be fixed. If you look at it this way, if we meet someone who is poison to us—someone we absolutely should not meet—we will suffer tremendous damage not only mentally but also physically and materially. And if you have a bad relationship with someone like this, the next time... When I meet people, I become so, so afraid of human relationships. I’ve given up on things like lovers, dates, romance, and love; in a word, I’ve just gotten sick of it. If anyone happens to feel this way, even just a little, you need to sort things out early on. This way, you won't end up with a situation where your mental health is completely shattered, you never want to see a woman again, or you feel a shiver down your spine. You need to have a healthy relationship so that you can feel happiness and personal growth through it. I hope you have a healthy relationship. If today’s meditation was helpful, please like, subscribe, and turn on notifications. I’ll see you next time. The quality of the women at the Bread, Honjae, and Lee Hee-jun meeting was incredible. Looking at it this way, for me, it is a great honor for my family and something I am so grateful for. I am grateful. [Music]
